salmanshh_dragndrop.name: Drag N Drop
salmanshh_dragndrop.description: Event-driven drag & drop: you decide when a drag starts and stops, and the object follows a drag point you update each tick. A drop-in replacement for Construct 3's built-in Drag & Drop, driven through Start Drag / Drop / Set Drag Point actions so a controller, touch gesture, AI routine, or virtual cursor can all drive it. Optional solid push-out, axis lock, break distance, and automatic throw-velocity measurement.

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.desc: Whether the behaviour is active when the layout starts.

followSpeed.name: Follow Speed
followSpeed.desc: Max speed in pixels per second the object catches up to the drag point. 0 = instant snap.

directions.name: Directions
directions.desc: Constrains drag movement, 8Direction style: free, single-axis, or snapped to 4 / 8 directions.

solidCollision.name: Solid Collision
solidCollision.desc: When on, the dragged object is pushed out of solids and cannot be dragged through them.

breakDistance.name: Break Distance
breakDistance.desc: Gap to the drag point that auto-ends the drag. 0 disables it.

breakAction.name: Break Action
breakAction.desc: What a break-distance end does: Drop applies the throw, Cancel ends silently.

AddSnapObject.description: Registers an object as a snap and magnet target by its position. Use a For each loop to add many. Needs a snap radius to take effect.

object.name: Object
object.desc: The object instance whose position becomes a snap target.

AddSnapPosition.description: Registers a world-space position as a snap and magnet target. Needs a snap radius to take effect.

x.name: X
x.desc: World-space X of the snap target.

y.name: Y
y.desc: World-space Y of the snap target.

ClearSnapTargets.description: Removes all registered snap positions and snap objects.

Drop.description: Ends the current drag. Release applies the measured throw; Cancel ends silently. Ignored if not dragging.

how.name: How
how.desc: Release fires On Dropped with the throw; Cancel fires On Drag Cancelled with no throw.

SetBreakDistance.description: If the gap to the drag point grows past the distance, the drag ends automatically. 0 disables this.

distance.name: Distance
distance.desc: Maximum gap in pixels before the drag auto-ends. 0 disables.

action.name: Action
action.desc: Drop applies the throw and fires On Dropped; Cancel ends silently.

SetDirections.description: Constrains drag movement, 8Direction style: free, a single axis, or snapped to 4 / 8 directions.

directions.name: Directions
directions.desc: How the dragged object's movement is constrained.

SetDragPoint.description: Updates the world-space point the object follows. Call every tick while dragging.

x.name: X
x.desc: World-space X of the drag point (e.g. cursor or touch X).

y.name: Y
y.desc: World-space Y of the drag point (e.g. cursor or touch Y).

SetEnabled.description: Enables or disables the behaviour. Disabling cancels any in-progress drag.

SetFollowSpeed.description: How fast the object catches up to the drag point, in pixels per second. 0 = instant snap.

speed.name: Speed
speed.desc: Pixels per second. 0 means the object snaps to the drag point each tick.

SetMagnetStrength.description: How strongly the object is pulled toward an in-range snap target while dragging, from 0 (snap only on drop) to 1 (strong homing).

strength.name: Strength
strength.desc: 0 = no live pull (snap on drop only); 1 = strong magnetism.

SetSnapRadius.description: Distance in pixels within which the object snaps to a target on drop and is magnetised while dragging. 0 disables snapping.

radius.name: Radius
radius.desc: Snap and magnet range in pixels. 0 disables snapping.

SetSolidCollision.description: When on, the dragged object is pushed out of solids each tick and cannot be dragged through them.

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.desc: Whether solid push-out is active during the drag.

SetThrowVelocity.description: Overrides the measured throw before a release. Pass 0, 0 to suppress the throw entirely.

velX.name: Velocity X
velX.desc: X component of the throw velocity to report on the next release.

velY.name: Velocity Y
velY.desc: Y component of the throw velocity to report on the next release.

StartDrag.description: Begins dragging this object toward a drag point. Ignored if already dragging.

dragPointX.name: Drag point X
dragPointX.desc: World-space X of the point the object will follow.

dragPointY.name: Drag point Y
dragPointY.desc: World-space Y of the point the object will follow.

grabMode.name: Grab mode
grabMode.desc: Keep the object's offset from the drag point, or centre it on the point.

IsDragging.description: True while the object is being dragged.

IsEnabled.description: True if the behaviour is active.

IsSnapping.description: True while the dragged object is within snap radius of a target (so a drop would snap to it).

OnDragCancelled.description: Triggered when a drag ends via Drop (cancel) or a break-distance cancel. No throw is applied.

OnDropped.description: Triggered when a drag ends via Drop (release) or a break-distance drop. The throw is available.

OnHitSolid.description: Triggered the first tick the dragged object is pushed out of a solid (solid collision must be on).

OnSnapped.description: Triggered after a release that lands within snap radius of a target. Fires alongside On Dropped. Read SnapTargetX, SnapTargetY, and SnappedObjectUID.

DistanceFromPoint.description: Current gap in pixels between the object and the drag point. Grows while blocked by a solid.

DragPointX.description: Current world-space X of the drag point.

DragPointY.description: Current world-space Y of the drag point.

DropReason.description: Why the drag ended: "manual" for a Drop action, "broke_distance" for a break-distance end.

SnappedObjectUID.description: UID of the object snapped to on the last drop, or -1 if the snap was a position or no snap occurred.

SnapTargetX.description: X of the nearest snap target. While dragging it tracks the nearest target; after a snap it is the snapped position.

SnapTargetY.description: Y of the nearest snap target. While dragging it tracks the nearest target; after a snap it is the snapped position.

ThrowSpeed.description: Magnitude of the throw velocity. Use inside On Dropped.

ThrowVelocityX.description: X component of the measured throw velocity. Use inside On Dropped.

ThrowVelocityY.description: Y component of the measured throw velocity. Use inside On Dropped.
